prophecies.a: 人们将被过多的信息所淹没，导致决策困难、焦虑增加和心理压力。未来的社会将面临「过度选择」的困境——选择太多反而令人无所适从。
prophecies.a_en: People will be overwhelmed by too much information, leading to decision paralysis, increased anxiety, and psychological stress. Future society will face the dilemma of 'overchoice' — too many options leaving people unable to decide.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2000年代互联网普及后，信息过载成为公认的社会现象。2010年代社交媒体进一步加剧了这一趋势。美国心理学会多年调查显示，新闻过载是美国人压力的主要来源之一。托夫勒在1970年首创「信息过载」一词，该术语至今仍被广泛使用。
prophecies.verdict_en: Information overload became a widely recognized phenomenon after the internet went mainstream in the 2000s. Social media further amplified this trend in the 2010s. The American Psychological Association has repeatedly found news overload to be a major source of stress. Toffler coined the term 'information overload' in 1970, and it remains in widespread use today.

prophecies.a: 社会将变得越来越「一次性」——不仅是物品，连人际关系、工作、住所都将变得短暂和可抛弃。人们更换工作、伴侣、住址的频率将大幅增加。
prophecies.a_en: Society will become increasingly 'disposable' — not just goods, but relationships, jobs, and homes will become transient and expendable. The frequency of changing jobs, partners, and addresses will increase dramatically.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 美国劳工统计局数据显示，现代劳动者平均在职时间约4.1年，远低于上一代。快时尚产业年产超1000亿件服装，大量被迅速丢弃。美国人口普查数据显示，约11%的人口每年搬家。一次性消费文化已成为全球普遍现象。
prophecies.verdict_en: US Bureau of Labor Statistics data shows modern workers stay at jobs an average of 4.1 years, far less than previous generations. The fast fashion industry produces over 100 billion garments annually, most quickly discarded. US Census data shows roughly 11% of the population moves each year. Disposable consumer culture has become a global phenomenon.

prophecies.a: 消费者将不再只是被动的购买者，而是积极参与产品的设计和生产过程。「产消者」——既是生产者也是消费者——将成为经济中的重要力量。
prophecies.a_en: Consumers will no longer be passive buyers but will actively participate in designing and producing products. The 'prosumer' — both producer and consumer — will become a major force in the economy.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 「产消者」概念已在多个领域成为现实。YouTube（2005年创立）让普通人成为内容创作者；维基百科由用户共同编写；开源软件由用户社区开发；Etsy等平台让消费者直接成为卖家。2020年代的创作者经济（Creator Economy）估值超1000亿美元，正是托夫勒所预见的产消者革命。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 'prosumer' concept has materialized across many domains. YouTube (founded 2005) turned ordinary people into content creators; Wikipedia is written by its users; open-source software is developed by user communities; platforms like Etsy let consumers become sellers. The 2020s Creator Economy, valued at over $100 billion, is precisely the prosumer revolution Toffler foresaw.

prophecies.a: 大量的工作将从办公室转移到家中。电子通信技术将使「电子家庭」成为可能——人们在家中通过电子设备完成工作，通勤将大幅减少。
prophecies.a_en: Much work will shift from offices to homes. Electronic communication technology will make the 'electronic cottage' possible — people will work from home through electronic devices, and commuting will decrease significantly.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2020年新冠疫情加速了远程办公的普及，但趋势早已开始。斯坦福大学研究显示，2023年约27%的美国工作日在家完成。Zoom、Slack等工具让「电子家庭」成为现实。托夫勒在1980年提出的「电子家庭」概念几乎精确预见了40年后的工作模式变革。
prophecies.verdict_en: The 2020 COVID-19 pandemic accelerated remote work adoption, but the trend had already begun. Stanford research shows about 27% of US workdays were done from home in 2023. Tools like Zoom and Slack made the 'electronic cottage' reality. Toffler's 1980 concept almost exactly predicted the work transformation that occurred 40 years later.

prophecies.a: 传统的核心家庭（父母加子女）将不再是社会的主导家庭形式。单亲家庭、丁克家庭、同居关系、重组家庭等多元化家庭结构将日益普遍。
prophecies.a_en: The traditional nuclear family (parents plus children) will no longer be the dominant family form. Single-parent families, childless couples, cohabitation, blended families, and other diverse family structures will become increasingly common.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 美国人口普查数据显示，2020年仅约20%的美国家庭符合传统核心家庭定义（已婚夫妇加子女），而1970年这一比例约为40%。单亲家庭、独居、同居等非传统家庭形式大幅增长。全球多数发达国家呈现类似趋势。
prophecies.verdict_en: US Census data shows only about 20% of American households fit the traditional nuclear family definition (married couple with children) in 2020, down from roughly 40% in 1970. Single-parent households, single-person households, and cohabitation have grown significantly. Most developed nations show similar trends.

prophecies.a: 人类将掌握克隆技术和基因工程，能够复制生物体并改造基因。这将引发深刻的伦理争议。
prophecies.a_en: Humans will master cloning and genetic engineering, able to replicate organisms and modify genes. This will provoke profound ethical debates.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 1996年克隆羊多莉诞生，证实了哺乳动物克隆的可行性。2003年人类基因组计划完成。2012年CRISPR-Cas9基因编辑技术问世，2018年中国科学家贺建奎制造出首批基因编辑婴儿，引发全球伦理争议。基因工程从预言变为现实并持续引发托夫勒所预见的伦理辩论。
prophecies.verdict_en: Dolly the sheep was cloned in 1996, proving mammalian cloning feasible. The Human Genome Project was completed in 2003. CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing emerged in 2012, and in 2018, Chinese scientist He Jiankui created the first gene-edited babies, sparking global ethical controversy. Genetic engineering has moved from prediction to reality, continuing to provoke the ethical debates Toffler foresaw.

prophecies.a: 知识将取代资本和劳动力，成为最重要的经济资源和权力来源。拥有知识的人和组织将主导未来经济。传统的制造业将让位于信息和知识产业。
prophecies.a_en: Knowledge will replace capital and labor as the most important economic resource and source of power. People and organizations with knowledge will dominate the future economy. Traditional manufacturing will give way to information and knowledge industries.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 2024年全球市值最高的公司几乎全是知识/科技企业（苹果、微软、英伟达、Alphabet、亚马逊）。美国GDP中服务业占比超过77%，制造业仅约11%。世界银行将知识经济列为发展中国家经济增长的关键驱动力。
prophecies.verdict_en: In 2024, the world's most valuable companies are nearly all knowledge/tech firms (Apple, Microsoft, Nvidia, Alphabet, Amazon). Services account for over 77% of US GDP while manufacturing is only about 11%. The World Bank identifies the knowledge economy as a key driver of growth for developing nations.

prophecies.q: 大规模定制取代大规模生产
prophecies.a: 工业时代的大规模标准化生产将被大规模定制所取代。消费者将能够获得按个人需求定制的产品，而不再只有千篇一律的标准品。
prophecies.a_en: Industrial-era mass standardized production will be replaced by mass customization. Consumers will be able to get products tailored to individual needs rather than one-size-fits-all standard goods.
prophecies.verdict_zh: Nike By You（原NikeID）让消费者定制运动鞋；戴尔早在1990年代就推出按需定制电脑；3D打印技术使小批量定制生产成为可能。亚马逊的个性化推荐、Spotify的个人歌单、Netflix的推荐算法都是大规模定制在数字领域的体现。
prophecies.verdict_en: Nike By You (formerly NikeID) lets consumers customize shoes; Dell pioneered build-to-order PCs in the 1990s; 3D printing enables small-batch custom manufacturing. Amazon's personalized recommendations, Spotify's personal playlists, and Netflix's recommendation algorithms all exemplify mass customization in the digital realm.

prophecies.a: 大众媒体将分裂为无数小众渠道。报纸、广播、电视等大众媒体的统治地位将被取代，人们将根据个人兴趣选择越来越细分的信息来源。
prophecies.a_en: Mass media will fragment into countless niche channels. The dominance of newspapers, radio, and television will be replaced as people choose increasingly specialized information sources based on personal interests.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 传统大众媒体的影响力持续下降。美国报纸发行量从1990年的6200万降至2020年的2400万。播客数量超过400万个，YouTube频道数以千万计。社交媒体算法为每个用户创造个性化信息流。「去大众化」已从预言变为媒体行业的基本现实。
prophecies.verdict_en: Traditional mass media influence has steadily declined. US newspaper circulation dropped from 62 million in 1990 to 24 million in 2020. There are over 4 million podcasts and tens of millions of YouTube channels. Social media algorithms create personalized feeds for each user. 'Demassification' has gone from prediction to the fundamental reality of the media industry.

prophecies.a: 社会将分裂为越来越多的亚文化群体，每个群体拥有自己的价值观、生活方式和消费模式。统一的大众文化将逐渐消失。
prophecies.a_en: Society will fragment into an increasing number of subcultures, each with its own values, lifestyles, and consumption patterns. Unified mass culture will gradually disappear.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 互联网时代催生了无数亚文化社群：从Reddit的数十万个子论坛，到TikTok上的无数细分兴趣圈层（BookTok、CleanTok等），再到各类小众爱好社区。皮尤研究中心指出，美国社会在政治、文化、消费习惯上的分化程度达到了数十年来的最高点。
prophecies.verdict_en: The internet era has spawned countless subculture communities: from Reddit's hundreds of thousands of subreddits, to TikTok's numerous niche interest circles (BookTok, CleanTok, etc.), to various hobbyist communities. Pew Research Center notes that American society has reached its highest levels of polarization in decades across politics, culture, and consumption habits.

prophecies.a: 家庭将充满智能设备，房屋本身将变得「智能化」，能够自动调节温度、灯光和安全系统。技术将深度嵌入日常生活的每个角落。
prophecies.a_en: Homes will be filled with intelligent devices, and houses themselves will become 'smart', automatically adjusting temperature, lighting, and security systems. Technology will be deeply embedded in every corner of daily life.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 智能家居已成为主流市场。截至2024年，全球智能家居设备市场规模超过1200亿美元。亚马逊Alexa、Google Home、苹果HomeKit等平台让数亿家庭实现了智能温控、智能照明和智能安防。Statista数据显示，2024年全球约有5亿智能家庭。
prophecies.verdict_en: Smart homes have become a mainstream market. As of 2024, the global smart home device market exceeds $120 billion. Platforms like Amazon Alexa, Google Home, and Apple HomeKit have brought smart climate control, lighting, and security to hundreds of millions of homes. Statista reports approximately 500 million smart homes globally in 2024.

prophecies.a: 实体货币将逐渐被电子货币所取代。金融交易将越来越多地通过电子方式进行，传统银行业务将被根本性地改变。
prophecies.a_en: Physical currency will gradually be replaced by electronic money. Financial transactions will increasingly be conducted electronically, and traditional banking will be fundamentally transformed.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 移动支付和数字金融已席卷全球。中国的支付宝和微信支付覆盖超过10亿用户；瑞典现金交易占比已低于10%。比特币（2009）和各国央行数字货币（CBDC）项目进一步推动了货币电子化。Visa数据显示，2023年全球数字支付交易额超过9万亿美元。
prophecies.verdict_en: Mobile payments and digital finance have swept the globe. China's Alipay and WeChat Pay cover over 1 billion users; cash transactions in Sweden account for less than 10%. Bitcoin (2009) and central bank digital currency (CBDC) projects have further advanced electronic money. Visa data shows global digital payment transactions exceeded $9 trillion in 2023.

prophecies.a: 教育将不再局限于青少年时期。知识更新的速度将迫使人们终身学习、不断更新技能。传统的「先学习后工作」的线性模式将被打破。
prophecies.a_en: Education will no longer be confined to youth. The pace of knowledge renewal will force people to learn throughout their lives and continuously update skills. The traditional linear model of 'learn first, then work' will be broken.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 在线教育平台（Coursera、edX、Udemy）拥有数亿注册学习者。LinkedIn Learning、各类编程训练营蓬勃发展。世界经济论坛《2023年未来就业报告》指出，到2027年44%的工作者核心技能将发生变化，终身学习已成为职场生存的必要条件。
prophecies.verdict_en: Online learning platforms (Coursera, edX, Udemy) have hundreds of millions of registered learners. LinkedIn Learning and coding bootcamps have flourished. The World Economic Forum's 2023 Future of Jobs Report states that 44% of workers' core skills will change by 2027, making lifelong learning a necessity for career survival.

prophecies.a: 权力将从民族国家向上转移至跨国组织，向下转移至地方和个人。传统的国家主权将受到侵蚀，全球性问题需要超越国界的合作来解决。
prophecies.a_en: Power will shift upward from nation-states to transnational organizations and downward to localities and individuals. Traditional national sovereignty will erode, and global problems will require cross-border cooperation to solve.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 跨国组织（EU、WTO、WHO）的影响力确实增大，全球化在2000-2010年代达到高峰。但2016年英国脱欧、民族主义和保护主义回潮表明，国家主权的侵蚀并非单向趋势。权力同时向跨国和地方层面分散的判断部分正确，但民族国家仍是国际秩序的核心单位。
prophecies.verdict_en: Transnational organizations (EU, WTO, WHO) did gain influence, and globalization peaked in the 2000s-2010s. However, Brexit in 2016 and the resurgence of nationalism and protectionism show that sovereignty erosion is not a one-way trend. The prediction of power dispersing both upward and downward is partially correct, but nation-states remain the core unit of international order.

prophecies.a: 人体与电子设备将日益融合。人们将佩戴甚至植入电子设备来增强身体功能，模糊生物体与机器之间的界限。
prophecies.a_en: The human body and electronic devices will increasingly merge. People will wear or even implant electronic devices to enhance bodily functions, blurring the line between biological organisms and machines.
prophecies.verdict_zh: 可穿戴设备（Apple Watch、Fitbit）已成为主流，全球出货量超过5亿台。Neuralink于2024年完成首例人体脑机接口植入。人工耳蜗、智能假肢等医疗设备日益先进。但全面的人机融合仍处于早期阶段，距离「模糊生物体与机器界限」还有相当距离。
prophecies.verdict_en: Wearable devices (Apple Watch, Fitbit) have gone mainstream with over 500 million units shipped globally. Neuralink completed its first human brain-computer interface implant in 2024. Cochlear implants and smart prosthetics are increasingly advanced. However, full bio-electronic convergence is still in early stages, and the line between organisms and machines remains largely intact.
